metadata.title:
Form Company to


Build Labor Temple

pages.raw_text:
The trades council committee ap-
pointed to frame plans for the cree
ton of labor temple assembled yes
terday afternoon in the office of the
New Time. 1t was unanimously de-
cided that. the best way to proceed
was to incorporate Il company with
a capital Of $4,000, and that each
union be required to purchase GER
tain number of shares.


This scheme meets with general
approval and there is no doubt that
the trades council will endorse It at
its next session. None but labor
unions will be permitted to buy stock


The advisability of erecting tenn
pie of this kind has already been
considered by the council and APP
proved. Such a structure is said to
be positive necessity.
